mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS id, s.name AS name, s.sex AS sex, s.birth AS birth, c.class_name AS className, m.major_name AS majorName, e.education_name AS educationName, s.update_time AS updateTime, COUNT(sd.student_id) AS disciplineCount, SUM(sd.deduction_points) AS deductionPoints FROM student s LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN education e ON s.education_id = e.id LEFT JOIN student_discipline sd ON s.id = sd.student_id WHERE s.id = #{id} GROUP BY s.id
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET class_id = (SELECT id FROM class WHERE class_name = #{className}), major_id = (SELECT id FROM major WHERE major_name = #{majorName}), education_id = (SELECT id FROM education WHERE education_name = #{educationName}), update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT student_id AS studentId, discipline_date AS disciplineDate, discipline_reason AS disciplineReason, deduction_points AS deductionPoints FROM student_discipline WHERE student_id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO student_discipline(student_id, discipline_date, discipline_reason, deduction_points) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.disciplineDate}, #{item.disciplineReason}, #{item.deductionPoints})
